note1_organization.scope: Franchisor of Hilton family of brands within US, US territories, and Thailand for contracts executed/amended after October 24, 2007
note1_organization.ip_licensing: Licenses IP (brand names, trademarks, service marks) from wholly-owned Hilton affiliate on royalty-free basis, then sublicenses to third-party hotel owners

revenue_recognition.primary_performance_obligation: IP licenses granting right to access brand IP, reservations systems, and property management systems
revenue_recognition.recognition_method: Series of distinct services transferred over time; variable consideration (royalty fees) recognized using time as measure of progress in period earned
revenue_recognition.royalty_fees: Based on percentage of hotel's monthly gross room revenue; billed/collected monthly; recognized as services provided
revenue_recognition.franchise_incentives: Consideration paid to incentivize owners amortized over contract term (including sole-option extensions) as reduction to franchise royalty fees
revenue_recognition.sales_coo_fees: Fixed fees collected upfront; recognized as revenue over franchise contract term; not considered significant financing component
revenue_recognition.termination_fees: Recognized in period of receipt due to uncertainty of collection and no further service obligation

note2_accounting_policies.accounts_receivable: Primarily amounts due from franchised hotel owners; allowance for credit losses based on historical collection, instrument nature, current/forecasted conditions
note2_accounting_policies.financing_receivables: Loans to certain franchised hotel owners; separate allowance for credit losses

franchise_contracts.contract_acquisition_costs: Capitalized consideration paid to incentivize hotel owners
franchise_contracts.amortization_method: Straight-line over contract term (generally 10-20 years including sole-option extensions)
franchise_contracts.amortization_start: Later of hotel opening date or contract execution date
franchise_contracts.impairment: Evaluated for indicators; undiscounted cash flow test; if impaired, recognized at fair value with pro-rata allocation within asset group

note2_accounting_policies.franchise_deposits: Collected at application; current liability until non-refundable, then reclassified to deferred revenue
note2_accounting_policies.contract_liabilities: Non-refundable advance consideration from hotel owners; presented as deferred revenues; recognized over contract term
note2_accounting_policies.fair_value: Three-level hierarchy (Level 1/2/3); financial assets/liabilities estimated equal to carrying values as of 12/31/2024 and 12/31/2023
note2_accounting_policies.acquisitions: Assessed as business combination vs asset acquisition; asset acquisitions: cost allocated to individual assets/liabilities based on relative fair values; no goodwill recognized

note3_acquisition.transaction: Acquisition of Graduate franchise contracts (part of larger Hilton acquisition of Graduate brand)
note3_acquisition.payment: Paid by Hilton affiliate; HFH recognized short-term note payable (current intercompany payables), settled February 2024 with interest

note5_fair_value.statement: Fair values of financial assets and liabilities estimated to equal carrying values as of 12/31/2024 and 12/31/2023

note6_income_taxes.us_income_taxes: No provision — entity is disregarded for US income tax purposes; all taxable income included in Hilton's computation
note6_income_taxes.foreign_taxes: Certain US territories require taxation of franchise licensing payments to foreign-domiciled entities; rates vary by jurisdiction; franchisee responsible for withholding/remittance
note6_income_taxes.presentation: Foreign tax expense in statements of comprehensive income

note7_commitments_contingencies.debt_guarantees: Certain Hilton debt obligations (maturing 2025-2033) are unconditionally and irrevocably guaranteed by certain wholly-owned material domestic subsidiaries including HFH
note7_commitments_contingencies.collateral_pledge: All assets and franchise contracts pledged as collateral for term of debt agreements
note7_commitments_contingencies.guarantee_liability: None recorded due to parent-subsidiary relationship
note7_commitments_contingencies.litigation: Various claims and lawsuits in ordinary course; ultimate resolution not expected to have material adverse effect

note8_related_party.intercompany_balances: Result of Hilton's centralized cash management system (not controlled by HFH)
note8_related_party.franchise_deposits: Collected by Hilton affiliates, deposited in lockbox (HFH has no access); due from affiliates payable on demand
note8_related_party.classification: Settlements as operating activities; distributions as financing activities
note8_related_party.amounts_not_expected_repaid: Reflected as component of member's equity (Due from Hilton affiliates equity deduction)
note8_related_party.graduate_acquisition: Payment made by Hilton affiliate; HFH recognized short-term note payable (settled Feb 2024 with interest)
note8_related_party.operator_agreement: Agreement with Hilton affiliate; no compensation provided in 2024, 2023, or 2022

note9_subsequent_events.note: Date appears to be a typo — likely should be March 18, 2025 given the financial statements are for year ended 12/31/2024

key_findings: Entity is tax-transparent (disregarded entity for US income tax purposes)
All assets and franchise contracts pledged as collateral for Hilton's debt (maturing 2025-2033)
Graduate brand franchise contracts acquired for ~$85M in May 2024 (asset acquisition, 15-year useful life)
Intercompany cash management: HFH has no access to lockbox where franchise deposits are collected
Operator agreement with Hilton affiliate provides for 'reasonable fee' compensation but none was actually paid in any of the three years
Subsequent events note date appears to contain a typo (March 18, 2024 vs expected 2025)
